title: Création et promotion de réseaux forestiers et agricoles pour stimuler l'adoption des technologies biologiques et le développement de la chaîne de valeur
description: A coordination and support action under Horizon Europe seeking to create regional forest and agricultural networks to drive the adoption of bio-based technologies and develop sustainable value chains. It engages stakeholders through workshops, knowledge transfer, and multi-actor collaboration across six European regions to promote climate resilience and circular economy principles.
